name: Sprint 3 — Remaining Highs + UX Hardening
goal: Close H-5 (library error logging), H-6 (RLS UPDATE/DELETE policies), M-2 (negative cost_usd), M-5 (dimension arithmetic), M-6 (null search guard), M-7 (debounce saves), M-8 (delete modal).

schemaDelta.note: H-6: added FOR UPDATE and FOR DELETE policies on configurations table, scoped to auth.uid()=user_id.

notes: H-6 schema change requires running updated schema.sql in Supabase dashboard (MERGED_PENDING_PLAYBOOK). All other fixes are code-only and immediately active. M-8 uses inline pendingDelete state (3s auto-cancel) instead of window.confirm — no modal component added. M-7 debounce is 500ms; immediate optimistic local state update prevents UI stutter.
